title: An Account of the Dispatch of Bugha al -Kabir to the Tribesmen
description: Tribesmen It is reported that the trouble began when the Banu Sulaym44 behaved insolently toward the people around Medina. Whenever [1336] 43. Bugha al-Kabir (the Elder) was a military commander of Turkish descent (Bugha = "bull") active during the reigns of al-Mu'tagim, al-Wathiq, and al-Mutawakkil. He died in 248 (862-63); Tabari, III, 1174; Marin, Reign, ii and n. 91; Index, 134; E12, s.v. Bugha al-Kabir. Another Bugha, called al-$aghir ("the Younger"), makes his appearance below.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
